words.definition: A place where many books are kept for people to read or borrow.
words.example: We read books in the library.
words.example_translation: 我們在圖書館裡看書。

words.definition: To put colour on paper or a wall using a brush.
words.example: I paint a picture of my family.
words.example_translation: 我畫了一幅我家人的畫。

words.definition: Tasting very good.
words.example: The apple pie is delicious.
words.example_translation: 蘋果派很好吃。

words.definition: The state of the sky, such as sunny, rainy, or cloudy.
words.example: The weather is sunny today.
words.example_translation: 今天的天氣是晴朗的。

words.definition: Feeling very happy and eager about something.
words.example: I am excited about the school trip.
words.example_translation: 我對學校旅行感到很興奮。

words.definition: To take something from someone for a short time and give it back.
words.example: Can I borrow your pencil?
words.example_translation: 我可以借你的鉛筆嗎？

words.definition: A small animal with a big bushy tail that lives in trees.
words.example: The squirrel eats nuts.
words.example_translation: 松鼠吃堅果。

words.definition: Doing something with great attention to avoid mistakes or danger.
words.example: Please walk carefully on the wet floor.
words.example_translation: 請在潮濕的地板上小心行走。

words.definition: Special clothes worn by students at school.
words.example: I wear my uniform every day.
words.example_translation: 我每天穿我的校服。

words.definition: To speak very softly so that others cannot hear easily.
words.example: Do not whisper during the test.
words.example_translation: 考試期間不要低聲說話。

words.definition: Plants like carrots, broccoli, and spinach that we eat.
words.example: Eating vegetables keeps us healthy.
words.example_translation: 吃蔬菜讓我們保持健康。

words.definition: Not afraid when something is difficult or scary.
words.example: The brave dog saved the cat.
words.example_translation: 那隻勇敢的狗救了貓。

words.definition: A plan that shows what time things will happen.
words.example: Check the class schedule for homework time.
words.example_translation: 查看課程表以確定作業時間。

words.definition: Covered with wet dirt or mud.
words.example: My shoes are muddy after playing outside.
words.example_translation: 在外面玩之後，我的鞋子沾滿了泥。

words.definition: To give some of your things to other people.
words.example: It is nice to share toys with friends.
words.example_translation: 和朋友分享玩具是很好的。

words.definition: A loud noise heard in the sky during a storm.
words.example: I heard thunder after seeing lightning.
words.example_translation: 我看到閃電後聽到了雷聲。

words.definition: Able to wait or deal with problems without getting angry.
words.example: Be patient while waiting for your turn.
words.example_translation: 輪到你之前要有耐心。

words.definition: A tool used for cutting paper or fabric, with two blades.
words.example: Use scissors to cut the paper.
words.example_translation: 用剪刀剪紙。

words.definition: The act of traveling from one place to another.
words.example: The bus journey took twenty minutes.
words.example_translation: 巴士旅程花了二十分鐘。

words.definition: To make a room or area clean and organized.
words.example: Please tidy up your desk before leaving.
words.example_translation: 離開前請整理好你的課桌。
